articles.title: Mallikarjun Kharge among 7 Congress nominees for Rajya Sabha polls
articles.description: The Congress party has announced seven candidates for the upcoming Rajya Sabha elections. Party chief Mallikarjun Kharge will contest from Karnataka, alongside Mansoor Ali Khan and Pawan Khera. Other nominations include Pranav Jha from Jharkhand, Praveen Chakravarty from Tamil Nadu, Meenakshi Natarajan from MP, and Neeraj Dangi from Rajasthan.

articles.title: PM Modi good friend, India and US will get to trade deal, says Trump
articles.description: Responding to a question on the trade deal being negotiated between the two countries, Trump said India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs.

articles.title: DTCP removes encroachments in in DLF phase 3
articles.description: DTCP conducted anti-encroachment drive in DLF Phase-3, clearing public roads of illegal structures. Property owners warned to remove encroachments.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by author Dan Millman: ‘If you don't get what you want, you suffer; if you get what you don't want, you suffer; even when...’ - Why getting what you want still leaves you suffering
articles.description: Quote of the Day by author Dan Millman explains why desire often leads to suffering. Whether you get what you want or not, pain can follow. American author Dan Millman suggests peace comes from releasing the need for specific results. This idea remains relevant today. It encourages pursuing goals without tying well-being to their achievement.

articles.title: Asian stocks poised to edge lower, oil steadies
Keir Starmer tells Elon Musk to stop interfering in UK politics after viral murder case posts
articles.description: Elon Musk posted about the case on X, suggesting UK police were biased against white people.

articles.title: Biennial elections to Upper House: BJP nominates 11 candidates for Rajya Sabha polls in five states
articles.description: The BJP currently has 113 members in the Upper House, with the NDA tally at 148 as part of the 245-member Rajya Sabha.

articles.title: Biennial elections to Upper House: Congress picks 7, nominates Mallikarjun Kharge, Pawan Khera from Karnataka
articles.description: While AICC secretary Pranav Jha, attached to Kharge’s office in his capacity as party president, has been nominated for the Upper House from Jharkhand, AICC member and the party’s former general secretary for the state unit Neeraj Dangi was renominated from Rajasthan.

articles.title: Palestinians call on Trump to stop Israeli annexation
Rs 2,000-crore road-relaying push ahead of GBA polls
articles.description: Road relaying: Bengaluru will see a Rs 2,000-crore roadworks push ahead of Greater Bengaluru Authority elections. Officials plan to prioritise damaged roads affected by heavy traffic and rains, while opposition voices seek transparency on past spending.

articles.title: ‘BJP Used Pressure Tactics To Force Exits In MLC Polls’
articles.description: Nagpur: Congress MLA from Sakoli Nana Patole on Thursday alleged the BJP used law enforcement agencies to force the Congress to withdraw its first pic.

articles.title: Nagpur MLC bypoll: Admin prepares for smooth voting
articles.description: Nagpur: Election observer Sanjay Yadav on Thursday directed all nodal officers overseeing the Nagpur Local Authorities constituency bypoll to the Maha.

articles.title: Speaker rejects TMC expulsion of Ritabrata, Sandipan
articles.description: Kolkata: Bengal speaker Rathindra Bose said on Thursday that Trinamool's expulsion of MLAs Ritabrata Banerjee and Sandipan Saha did not happen in acco.

articles.title: Trump Compares Pool To Skyscrapers, Himself To MLK During Chaotic Oval Office Return
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump returned to public view after a week-long absence, but instead of focusing on Iran or mounting political challenges, he spent much of his Oval Office appearance discussing the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool and revisiting crowd-size comparisons involving Martin Luther King Jr.

articles.title: In open letter, Zelenskyy invites Putin to talks to end the war
articles.description: Ukraine war: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy published an open letter inviting Vladimir Putin to meet for direct talks to end the conflict. He said Kyiv is ready for peace but warned Ukraine will keep fighting if no agreement is reached.

articles.title: Russia Ready for Ukraine Peace Deal, But Zelensky Must Make Concessions, Putin Says
articles.description: President Vladimir Putin expressed Russia's willingness to negotiate a settlement to the Ukraine conflict, emphasizing that Ukraine must acknowledge territorial realities and make concessions.

articles.title: Inquiry ordered against senior official of PMC-run medical college over harassment allegations
articles.description: Inquiry ordered against senior official of PMC-run medical college over harassment allegations

articles.title: China’s closest allies mobilize? After Putin’s ‘secret shipments,’ Kim Jong-Un accelerates nuke push
articles.description: After reports of covert Russian weapons shipments, Kim Jong‐un has made a major nuclear move and toured a new factory for weapons‐grade material, boasting doubled production capacity. As Russia and North Korea tighten their alignment and China’s partners prepare for a Taiwan conflict, Washington faces shrinking options in a rapidly militarizing Indo‐Pacific.

articles.title: India must rise to lead, not dominate, says Bhagwat while citing US-Iran tensions
articles.description: Nagpur: Citing tensions between the United States and Iran, RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat on Thursday said the world listens only to the powerful, and asser.

articles.title: RWA opposes LDA move to sell parking slots
articles.description: Sargam Apartments RWA in Lucknow opposes LDA plan to sell 136 open parking slots via lottery, saying it’s common area and may hinder emergency access.

articles.title: 'No resignation, no new party': Tamil Nadu BJP chief dismisses Annamalai exit buzz
articles.description: Tamil Nadu BJP president Nainar Nagenthran has dismissed rumors of K Annamalai's resignation or plans to launch a new political outfit, stating there are no differences between them. This clarification follows intense speculation after Annamalai's meeting with Union Home Minister Amit Shah, fueled by reported disagreements over alliance strategies and Annamalai's desire to build the BJP as an independent force.

articles.title: White Paper reflects UDF government’s neo-liberal approach, alleges Rajeeve
articles.description: Rajeeve criticizes UDF's White Paper for prioritizing profit over public services and lacking a vision for Kerala's public sector.

articles.title: Trump May Resume War With Iran If US Troops Are Killed: Report
articles.description: A White House official said Trump still prefers a diplomatic solution to Iran's nuclear programme

articles.title: "Go be with your son": A father's resignation led to a shocking response from his boss
articles.description: An accountant's request to resign due to his son's critical illness was met with extraordinary compassion by his employer. The entrepreneur not only kept his position open but also continued his salary, fostering a sense of family. The son's recovery led to a heartwarming reunion, reinforcing the power of empathy in the workplace.

articles.title: After Trump’s Flirting, Mojtaba FIRES OFF Startling Response; ‘Even If US, Israel Try To...’ | Watch
articles.description: As Iran marked the anniversary of Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini’s death, Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei delivered a strong message warning of what he described as a new phase of “hybrid warfare” against the country. Khamenei claimed Iran’s adversaries had failed on the battlefield and were now trying to weaken public morale through fear, doubt, and division. He urged Iranians to stay united and resist attempts to spread pessimism and distrust.

articles.title: BJP Fields Debashish Samantray For June 18 Rajya Sabha Election
articles.description: Bhubaneswar: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) on Thursday announced Debashish Samantray as its candidate for the upcoming Rajya Sabha by-election from

articles.title: BJP announces Rajya Sabha candidates for 5 states ahead of June 18 polls; nominates Tarun Chugh from Madhya Pradesh
articles.description: The BJP has unveiled its Rajya Sabha candidates for upcoming elections across five states, including prominent figures like Tarun Chugh and Satish Poonia. Gujarat will see four BJP nominees, while Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan have also had their selections announced. Notably, Union ministers Ravneet Singh Bittu and George Kurian were absent from the list.

articles.title: Watch: Annamalai’s next move: A new political experiment? | Focus Tamil Nadu
articles.description: Tamil Nadu politics is changing faster than expected. After stepping away from the BJP, K. Annamalai appears determined to chart an independent political path. Can he build a regional political force with a nationalist outlook in a State long dominated by Dravidian politics?

articles.title: DMK to boycott INDIA bloc meeting on June 8 over the Congress strain
articles.description: DMK said its cadres remain deeply hurt by what they perceive as Congress’s betrayal.

articles.title: ISI`s new strategy exposed: Sleeper cells told to infiltrate political parties in J&K
articles.description: According to intelligence inputs, these operatives have been instructed to join mainstream political parties to remain beyond the immediate reach of security agencies while continuing their anti-national activities.

articles.title: Amit Shah chairs NEC’s 73rd Plenary Session in Shillong; 8 missions for 8 Northeast states launched
articles.description: Home Minister Amit Shah chairs the 73rd Plenary Session of the North Eastern Council (NEC) in Shillong, bringing together Governors and Chief Ministers of all eight Northeastern states to discuss development priorities for the region. The meeting focuses on connectivity, infrastructure, investment, regional integration and sustainable growth. Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia unveiled the 'Ashtalakshmi' vision, launching eight state-specific missions aimed at promoting the Northeast's unique strengths.Hashtags#NortheastIndia #AmitShah #NEC #Shillong #Ashtalakshmi #JyotiradityaScindia #DoNER #NortheastDevelopment #Infrastructure #Connectivity #EconomicGrowth #MugaSilk #LakadongTurmeric #NagaCoffee #BreakingNews #himantabiswasarma #assam #manipur #meghalya #jyotiradityascindia

articles.title: Employer Rejects Resignation Of Employee With Ill Son, His Reply Goes Viral
articles.description: The employer also asked if he could work from home, to which the accountant refused, saying that his son "needs me more than anything else".

articles.title: Wife admits to affair in mutual divorce case, court revokes Rs 10 lakh alimony
articles.description: The couple got married in 1996 and had two children. Eventually, it became difficult for them to continue as husband and wife, the Gauhati High Court noted.

articles.title: Mojtaba Khamenei warns against divisions after 'enemy's defeat on battlefield'
articles.description: Iran unity: Mojtaba Khamenei urged Iranians to remain united, saying enemies defeated on the battlefield are now trying to spread fear, doubt and mistrust. In a message read at commemorations, he called for resilience, cohesion and national solidarity.

articles.title: US World Cup visa priority may delay student applications this year: Report
articles.description: Faster visa processing for FIFA visitors is creating fresh uncertainty for international students

articles.title: 'For power, go to DKS; for strengthening Congress, come to me': New Karnataka PCC chief B K Hariprasad
articles.description: Karnataka Congress: Newly appointed KPCC chief B K Hariprasad said leaders seeking power and positions should go with CM D K Shivakumar, while those focused on strengthening the party should work with him. He pledged to build the organisation.

articles.title: Canada warns citizens of Immigration marriage fraud; says think carefully before marrying someone who ...
articles.description: Canada's immigration authority is warning citizens about marriage fraud when sponsoring partners. Be wary of quick marriages, multiple past relationships, and a lack of background details. These "relationships of convenience" aim solely for immigration, leaving sponsors with legal and financial burdens. Immigration officers are trained to detect such fraudulent intent.

articles.title: This sibling is likely to burn out before age 35, and the reason isn’t pressure, but this one thing parents ask them to do
articles.description: Firstborn daughters, particularly those with younger siblings, may face burnout earlier in life. This phenomenon, linked to 'eldest daughter syndrome,' stems from parentification, where children assume adult responsibilities prematurely. Research suggests this early burden can impact emotional well-being and increase burnout risk later. Parents are urged to assign age-appropriate tasks and avoid making children feel solely responsible for family care.

articles.title: Russia's Yasen-M Submarine Launches Missile Near NATO As Fears Grow Over Its Hypersonic Strike Power
articles.description: Russia's nuclear-powered attack submarine Arkhangelsk has launched a P-800 cruise missile near NATO territory, drawing renewed attention to the formidable capabilities of the Yasen-M class. Known for extreme stealth, advanced sonar systems, multi-role flexibility and the ability to carry Zircon hypersonic missiles, the submarine is considered one of the most dangerous underwater platforms in service today. Experts say the vessel was designed to challenge carrier strike groups and dominate undersea warfare. Watch the full report on Russia's growing naval power.#Russia #NATO #Submarine #YasenM #Arkhangelsk #ZirconMissile #BarentsSea #RussianNavy #MilitaryNews #HypersonicMissile #WorldNews #DefenseNews #NavalWarfare #BreakingNews #Geopolitics

articles.title: ‘Ceasefire... shooting in moderate manner’: Donald Trump explains his view of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
articles.description: Donald Trump shared his perspective on the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, describing it as a situation where hostilities have reduced but not completely stopped. He suggested that occasional exchanges of fire may continue in a limited manner while both sides work toward maintaining stability and preventing a wider regional conflict.

articles.title: Jaishankar meets Venezuela's acting president Rodriguez, backs deeper ties
articles.description: Venezuela's Acting President Delcy Rodriguez on Wednesday arrived in the national capital for a five-day working visit aimed at further deepening the bilateral ties between India and Venezuela

articles.title: EAM Jaishankar Meets Venezuela’s Acting Prez Rodriguez, Discusses Strengthening Bilateral Ties
articles.description: New Delhi: External Affairs Minister (EAM) S. Jaishankar on Thursday called on Venezuela's Acting President Delcy Rodriguez in New Delhi, appreciating her

articles.title: BCs are 56% of A.P., but hold only 40 MLA seats, says former DGP Purnachandra Rao
articles.description: Former DGP J. Purnachandra Rao said Andhra Pradesh's political representation does not match population, with BCs at 56% holding just 40 MLA seats.

articles.title: ‘Requesting all cockroaches to crawl’: Prakash Raj may join Abhijeet Dipke at Delhi protest
articles.description: Prakash Raj, known for being a vocal critic of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and PM Modi, expressed his willingness to join the protest in Delhi on June 6

articles.title: 'You Ruined Edu for 12 Years': Rahul Gandhi Hits Out at PM Modi After NEET Aspir...
articles.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi blamed Prime Minister Narendra Modi for "ruining" India's education system after a NEET aspirant's alleged suicide, linking the tragedy to examination irregularities and the mounting pressures faced by students.

articles.title: Meet Dhruv Rathee`s ex-scriptwriter, an LSE alumnus, and a top RTI activist lead `Cockroach Janta Party` expansion
articles.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) taps Sourav Das, Vijeta Dahiya, and Ashutosh Ranka to lead its Delhi protest demanding Education Minister's resignation.

articles.title: Trump to nominate former personal lawyer Todd Blanche as US attorney general
articles.description: Trump said at the White House that he plans to nominate Blanche formally on Thursday, according to a video posted on social media by a White House aide

articles.title: Jaishankar meets Venezuelan Acting President to boost bilateral ties
articles.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar met Venezuela's Acting President Delcy Rodriguez in New Delhi, reaffirming India's commitment to strengthening ties. Rodriguez is on a five-day visit and will also meet PM Modi to deepen cooperation.

articles.title: ‘Breaking parties apart’: AAP MP Sanjay Singh accuses BJP amid TMC split
articles.description: The Trinamool Congress has imploded into structural chaos. After a crushing defeat in the April 2026 assembly elections internal mutiny has fractured the party.

articles.title: Operation Delta Hunt: 501 More Suspected Illegal Bangladeshi Nationals Detained in Gujarat, Tally Crosses 1200 In 2 Days
articles.description: Gujarat's Operation Delta Hunt continues with 501 more suspected illegal Bangladeshi nationals detained. Over 1,200 people have been brought under scrutiny in less than two days.
